stack: meta-repo (umbrella) over Rust libs: pheno-xdd (CLI/docs) + pheno-xdd-lib (xDD utilities) + ports/ (hexagonal Schema port draft, 4 .rs files)
summary: G1 PARTIAL (placeholder SHA + tag-pinned actions), G2 PARTIAL (sub-repos OK, root MISSING README/AGENTS/Cargo), G3 PARTIAL (root dependabot is over-broad for a non-buildable dir), G4 DEGRADED (no workflow covers ports/), G5 DEGRADED (no .coderabbit/.gemini, 2 prunable worktrees, 1 unpushed commit). 3 P0, 4 P1.

evidence: 17 .github/workflows/*.yml across sub-repos (7 pheno-xdd + 10 pheno-xdd-lib) — all parse cleanly, NO @main rot, NO $123/$125 placeholders, NO 'Not Found' JSON appendices (this is the cleanest sub-fleet so far).

All actions use floating @v3/@v4/@v5 tags (actions/checkout, setup-python, upload-artifact, codeql-action, codecov, configure-pages, deploy-pages, upload-pages-artifact, github-script, gitleaks-action, cargo-deny-action, aquasecurity/trivy-action). Only dtolnay/rust-toolchain is SHA-pinned (3c5f7ea28cd621ae0bf5283f0e981fb97b8a7af9). Org-standard is full SHA-pinning.

P0: pheno-xdd-lib/.github/workflows/quality-gate.yml uses `uses: KooshaPari/phenotypeActions/promote@0000000000000000000000000000000000000000` with a comment 'placeholder SHA; source 404s; replace when reachable' — job is structurally dead, every PR will silently skip the promote step.
P1: aquasecurity/trivy-action is pinned to `bfa4b33a0e6c6c9c97c9d7e6e6f6c2d6a7c7c7c7 # pinned from @master` — close to org-canonical but a manually-copied SHA, no Renovate/dependabot refresh path.
Permissions + concurrency + workflow_dispatch present in 6/17 (legacy-tooling-gate, security-guard, security, ci in both). 11/17 still missing the permissions block.

PhenoSchema ROOT: NO README.md, NO AGENTS.md, NO Cargo.toml, NO LICENSE, NO CODEOWNERS, NO CONTRIBUTING.md, NO SECURITY.md. Only .github/dependabot.yml is tracked at root. Org standard requires root-level governance even for umbrella repos.
pheno-xdd + pheno-xdd-lib: AGENTS.md (71 lines each, both 71B — likely a copy), LICENSE (MIT), CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, .github/CODEOWNERS (default `* @kooshapari`) all present.
MISSING org-wide at sub-repos: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, FUNDING.yml, CITATION.cff, SUPPORT.md, .coderabbit.yaml, .gemini/.
PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md present in pheno-xdd only (NOT in pheno-xdd-lib) — drift between siblings.
ports/ has NO Cargo.toml, NO README, NO manifest of any kind — orphan sub-dir that cannot be built/tested by `cargo test`.

Sub-repos carry CodeQL (security-deep-scan.yml: rust+js matrix), gitleaks-action SHA-pinned (ff98106e4c7b2bc287b24eaf42907196329070c7 # v4), cargo-deny-action, trivy-action, security-guard.yml, security.yml — comprehensive.

dependabot.yml at ROOT covers cargo + pip + npm + gomod + github-actions (5 ecosystems, monthly). ports/ is NOT a buildable workspace — dependabot will spin empty PRs because there's no manifest to scan.
Sub-repos also have their own dependabot.yml (npm for pheno-xdd; cargo for pheno-xdd-lib) — 3 dependabot configs in one meta-repo with overlapping scopes.
NO workflow at any level (root or sub-repo) exercises ports/ — `ports/tests/schema.rs` is the only test in the ports dir (5 cases per cc0ef98) but no CI runs them.
P0: ports/ has no Cargo.toml, so `cargo test -p ports` cannot resolve; the T68 port commit (cc0ef98) advertises '5 tests' but they will not be executed by any pipeline.
Sub-repo quality-gate.yml in pheno-xdd-lib is the only real `cargo test` runner, and it is degraded by the placeholder promote SHA (G1).
P1: coverage.yml in pheno-xdd-lib is a 456B stub — likely `echo 'configured'` placeholder, not wired to cargo-llvm-cov or tarpaulin.
1 unpushed local commit on chore/dependabot-2026-06-08: 416b0f6 (dependabot.yml 94 lines) — not on main, no open PR.

Sub-repos carry stale unmerged worktrees: pheno-xdd-lib has `phenotype-xdd-lib-docs` (prunable, 7f95d4b) and pheno-xdd has `phenotype-xdd-docs` (prunable, 647c393) — both `prunable` per `git worktree list`, vestigial from a docs-site fan-out.

ISSUE_TEMPLATE drift: pheno-xdd has 4 files (bug_report.md + bug_report.yml + feature_request.md + feature_request.yml — same content in two formats); pheno-xdd-lib has 3 (bug.md, bug_report.md, feature.yml, feature_request.md). No consistency.
PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md in pheno-xdd (present), MISSING in pheno-xdd-lib and root.
ports/tests/schema.rs is the only test exercising T68 (5 cases: validate ok/error paths across JsonSchema + Zod adapters). It runs nowhere in CI.
Sub-repo e2e: pheno-xdd-lib has tests/{property_tests.rs, contract_tests.rs, mutation_tests.rs} declared in Cargo.toml; pheno-xdd has tests/bdd/ — both run via sub-repo quality-gate.yml.
No Playwright/Cypress, no docker-compose test runner, no schema-validation integration harness — schema-validation gate is absent despite the port's whole purpose.

additional_findings.root_is_unreadable_meta: PhenoSchema is a meta-repo (umbrella over 2 sibling Rust projects + 1 ports/ draft) but ships no README, no AGENTS.md, no root Cargo.toml. A new contributor landing here cannot tell that pheno-xdd and pheno-xdd-lib are independent sub-repos with their own .git dirs (not git submodules — git worktree list shows each as a separate root).
additional_findings.ports_is_orphan: ports/{src,tests} contains 4 .rs files (schema.rs + 2 adapters + 1 test) but no Cargo.toml and no parent workspace member declaration. cc0ef98 advertises 5 tests in T68; without a manifest they are dead code from any tooling perspective.
additional_findings.three_dependabot_configs: .github/dependabot.yml (root, 5 ecosystems) + pheno-xdd/.github/dependabot.yml (npm) + pheno-xdd-lib/.github/dependabot.yml (cargo) — overlapping scopes, monthly schedule shared, but no consolidation comment explaining which ecosystem lives where.
additional_findings.issue_template_format_drift: pheno-xdd has both .md and .yml forms for bug_report + feature_request; pheno-xdd-lib mixes bug.md + bug_report.md + feature.yml + feature_request.md. Org standard is 3-file .yml set (bug, feature, config).
additional_findings.vestigial_docs_worktrees: phenotype-xdd-lib-docs (7f95d4b, prunable) + phenotype-xdd-docs (647c393, prunable) sit under repos/.worktrees/. Per tick-19 these are snapshot-era fan-out residue.

actions_recommended.title: Add Cargo.toml (or workspace member declaration) under ports/ AND a workflow that runs `cargo test -p pheno-schema`
actions_recommended.detail: ports/ has 4 .rs files and tests/schema.rs but no manifest — cc0ef98's '5 tests' are dead. Create ports/Cargo.toml (package name `pheno-schema` per the trait module), add it to a root [workspace] (or document it as a standalone crate), and add a ports.yml workflow that runs `cargo test -p pheno-schema`. Without this, T68 cannot be claimed shipped.

actions_recommended.title: Replace placeholder promote SHA in pheno-xdd-lib quality-gate.yml
actions_recommended.detail: `uses: KooshaPari/phenotypeActions/promote@0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 # placeholder SHA; source 404s; replace when reachable` is silently making the promote job a no-op. Either pin the real SHA once the source is reachable or delete the step + the 'promote' job. Also pin all @v3/@v4/@v5 action refs to SHA per org standard.

actions_recommended.title: Add root README.md, AGENTS.md, and Cargo.toml; push 1 unpushed commit; prune 2 vestigial worktrees
actions_recommended.detail: Root has zero governance docs. Add a short README.md explaining PhenoSchema is an umbrella (pheno-xdd + pheno-xdd-lib + ports/) with link-outs; add a root AGENTS.md that delegates to sub-repo AGENTS.md; add a root Cargo.toml declaring `[workspace] members = ['pheno-xdd', 'pheno-xdd-lib']` (exclude ports until P0-#1 lands). Then `git push origin chore/dependabot-2026-06-08` (or merge to main) for the dependabot.yml commit, and `git worktree prune` in both sub-repos to drop phenotype-xdd-lib-docs + phenotype-xdd-docs.

deep_research: PhenoSchema is the smallest meta-repo in the Phenotype umbrella fleet — 5 git-tracked files at root, 4 .rs files in ports/, plus two full sub-repos (pheno-xdd, pheno-xdd-lib) each under its own .git dir. It positions itself as the schema-validation port layer (T68 hexagonal Schema port, 3 adapters: JsonSchema, Zod, CborSchema per ports/src/schema.rs:11), but is structurally incomplete: ports/ has no Cargo.toml so the 5 tests cc0ef98 advertises run nowhere, and no workflow exercises the port. Compared to the tick-25 hygiene wave (chatta 3.2/5, argis-extensions 2.6/5 hard-fail on SHA rot), PhenoSchema is unique in being CLEAN on workflow corruption — zero @main rot, zero $123/$125 placeholders, zero 'Not Found' JSON appendices — but DEGRADED on meta-repo scaffolding: no root README/AGENTS.md/Cargo.toml, no root governance, and a placeholder promote SHA in pheno-xdd-lib quality-gate.yml that silently makes the promote job a no-op. Closest peers are FocalPoint and phenoXdd (single-subdir siblings) plus tick-22 SSOT work. The 3 dependabot configs (root cargo+pip+npm+gomod+github-actions; sub-repos npm or cargo alone) overlap and the root config will spin empty PRs against a non-buildable root.
deep_research_cont: Two cross-cutting issues: (1) issue-template drift — pheno-xdd has .md+.yml duplicates, pheno-xdd-lib mixes bug.md+bug_report.md+feature.yml+feature_request.md, neither matches the org-standard 3-file .yml set; (2) 2 prunable sub-repo worktrees (phenotype-xdd-lib-docs, phenotype-xdd-docs), both the same docs-site fan-out, both `prunable` per `git worktree list` — tick-19 vestige. The single unpushed commit (416b0f6, dependabot.yml 94 lines) is benign. Sub-repos are individually healthy: AGENTS.md 71 lines each, MIT LICENSE, CodeQL + gitleaks + cargo-deny + trivy wired, dependabot monthly. Hygiene debt is concentrated in 3 spots: root is empty, ports/ has no manifest, pheno-xdd-lib quality-gate.yml carries a placeholder promote SHA. Net: 2.9/5 — workflow content clean, meta-repo scaffolding missing, T68 unverifiable until Cargo.toml + CI land.
